prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical portrait of a beautiful young woman sitting alone on a large mossy gray rock at the edge of a crystal-clear turquoise blue lake in a lush green and yellow forest. She has long dark brown wavy hair falling over one shoulder, a soft gentle smile, and a calm peaceful pose. She is wearing a light pastel cream floral kurta with pink, blue, and green embroidery, a matching dupatta draped over one shoulder and across the rock, black leggings, small gold earrings, and bare feet dipped into the water. Her left hand lightly holds the dupatta near her chest while her right hand is extended over the lake, playfully tossing water upward so bright droplets and tiny splashes freeze in mid-air. Show circular ripples around her feet and a clear reflection of her outfit and legs on the lake surface. The scene is framed by birch trunks and leafy branches on the left, evergreen branches on the right, and softly blurred dense forest in the background. Use warm natural golden-hour sunlight filtering through the trees, realistic skin and fabric texture, cinematic depth of field, vivid but natural colors, serene outdoor fashion photography mood, high detail, no text, no watermark, vertical 9:16 composition.
